'''chathazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemonicalist|mnemonicalist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemonicalist|mnemonicalist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthæzhæth|chæthæzhæth]] || [[word:chæthæzhæj|chæthæzhæj]] || [[word:chæthæzhæsh|chæthæzhæsh]] || [[word:chæthæzhæ|chæthæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathathazhath|chathathazhath]] || [[word:chathathazhaj|chathathazhaj]] || [[word:chathathazhash|chathathazhash]] || [[word:chathathazha|chathathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathazhath|chathazhath]] || [[word:chathazhaj|chathazhaj]] || [[word:chathazhash|chathazhash]] || [[word:chathazha|chathazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathafzhath|chathafzhath]] || [[word:chathafzhaj|chathafzhaj]] || [[word:chathafzhash|chathafzhash]] || [[word:chathafzhaf|chathafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathazhatha|chathazhatha]] || [[word:chathazhaja|chathazhaja]] || [[word:chathazhasha|chathazhasha]] || [[word:chathazhaka|chathazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathazhath|chathazhath]] || [[word:chathazhaj|chathazhaj]] || [[word:chathazhash|chathazhash]] || [[word:chathazha|chathazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathazhathal|chathazhathal]] || [[word:chathazhajal|chathazhajal]] || [[word:chathazhashal|chathazhashal]] || [[word:chathazhakal|chathazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathazhathatha|chathazhathatha]] || [[word:chathazhajaja|chathazhajaja]] || [[word:chathazhashasha|chathazhashasha]] || [[word:chathazhaka|chathazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathazhathan|chathazhathan]] || [[word:chathazhajan|chathazhajan]] || [[word:chathazhashan|chathazhashan]] || [[word:chathazhakan|chathazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathazhathaoro|chathazhathaoro]] || [[word:chathazhajaoro|chathazhajaoro]] || [[word:chathazhashaoro|chathazhashaoro]] || [[word:chathazhakaoro|chathazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
